name: deckpilot
description: Conversational CLI that turns chat into polished PowerPoint decks, powered by the GitHub Copilot SDK.

scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run manifest

config.description: Read or write persistent DeckPilot defaults (~/.deckpilot/config.json). Used by `start`, `chat`, and `resume` when no CLI flag is passed.

project.description: Manage saved projects: list, show, rename, export, delete (single or bulk). Projects live at ~/.deckpilot/projects/<slug>/.

template.description: Manage saved templates: list, show, create, edit, export, import, delete (single or bulk). Templates live at ~/.deckpilot/templates/<name>/.

skill.description: Manage skills: staged AI instructions (intake, per-slide checks, final review) applied during deck creation. List, show, create, edit, delete. Skills live at ~/.deckpilot/skills/<name>/SKILL.md.
